body.title: Every writing skill (the RUNNING copy) targets devlab/runtime/memory/ — retire lab/ + design_docs write-paths
body.description:
**Problem (ROOT CAUSE):** Writing skills emit dev-process artifacts to retired paths — /sorted writes the decision .md to lab/design_docs/decisions/ + the log to lab/design_docs_for_igor/decisions_log.dsb + projects via lab/claudecode; day-close commits lab/design_docs/; audit scripts reference lab/. This misfiled days of recent decisions to dead lab/design_docs/. CRITICAL: the copy the harness actually executes is ~/.claude/skills/ — that is the copy that misfiled D-workflow-md to lab/design_docs/ THIS session. Fixing only repo skills/ would close 'done' while the running copy keeps leaking until a sync propagates.

**Shape:** Audit every skill + writer script that PERSISTS an artifact; redirect to devlab/runtime/memory/<type>/. Decisions emit as JSON via memory_emit.py into decisions/ with the FULL narrative in body.text (nothing lost). Update /sorted Steps 6/7/8, /migrate-decisions, day-close Step 13, /ticket, /note, /savestate, and devlab/claudecode/ writers referencing lab/. Then propagate to the running copy: run /skills-sync (verify direction repo skills/ -> ~/.claude/skills/) OR fix both, so the EXECUTING skill writes canonical.

**Affected files:** skills/sorted/SKILL.md, skills/migrate-decisions/SKILL.md, skills/day-close/SKILL.md, skills/ticket/SKILL.md, skills/note/SKILL.md, skills/savestate/*, devlab/claudecode/ writers referencing lab/; ~/.claude/skills/ (via /skills-sync).
**Design rules:** canonical-memory-location law; single-source-of-truth; no-data-loss (narrative preserved in body.text).
**Scope boundary:** IN — redirect WRITE paths in repo skills/ + writers to devlab/runtime/memory/, preserve decision narrative in the canonical JSON body, AND propagate to the running ~/.claude/skills copy. OUT — read-ref sweep (T-lab-designdocs-ref-sweep), folder removal (T-retire-*), the .md-vs-JSON authoring-form choice (keep any .md form canonical-located if retained — do not delete content).
**Test plan:** FUNCTIONAL (not grep): drive the decision-emit path and assert a JSON file lands under devlab/runtime/memory/decisions/ carrying the full narrative in body.text AND nothing is written under lab/ or design_docs/. Repeat against the running ~/.claude/skills copy (or assert the sync ran repo->~/.claude).
**Completion criteria:** the skill the harness actually runs (~/.claude/skills, kept in sync with repo skills/) writes every dev-process artifact only under devlab/runtime/memory/; emitting a decision lands a JSON file in decisions/ whose body.text holds the full narrative; nothing is written under lab/ or design_docs/; the repo->~/.claude sync direction is verified.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Writing skills (repo + running ~/.claude copy) emit decisions JSON-only to devlab/runtime/memory/ via memory_emit; /outcome re-emits reusing the stamp; audit-design/hypothesis read body.text; day-close stages the canonical store; /migrate-decisions retired. Proof: tests/test_skill_write_paths_canonical.py::test_no_writing_skill_misfiles_to_lab_design_docs (red→green, afe46e9b).
